description: List of payments in Judaeo-Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals. On verso there are additional accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. The fractions in the transcription below are based on Ashtor's edition; these need to be confirmed. See Goitein's index card for other possibilities.
description_he: רשימת תשלומים ביהודית-ערבית ובספרות קופטיות. על הגב: חשבונות נוספים בכתב ערבי.
